sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Current state: after clicking charcoal, state is approximately (0, 1) or similar
# Let me check the current state first
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Current state:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        b = n['boundary']
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        print(f"  white rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)} cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)} width={max(cols)-min(cols)+1}")
    if n['color'] in ['c', 'N']:
        b = n['boundary']
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        print(f"  color={n['color']} rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)} cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

# Try clicking the light green gap in the black bar (rows 40-43, cols 28-29)
print("\nTrying to click light green gap at cols 28-29:")
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 41, 'col': 28}])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("State after clicking light green gap:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['c', 'N', 'W']:
        b = n['boundary']
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        if n['pixels'] <= 50 or n['color'] == 'W':
            print(f"  color={n['color']} rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)} cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)} pixels={n['pixels']}")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
print(f"Board changed: {last_action_result.get('board_changed', False)}")
print(f"Gameplay changed: {last_action_result.get('gameplay_changed', False)}")
print(f"No impact: {last_action_result.get('no_impact', False)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
